headline: Explore the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index in today's session.
summary: Curious about the top performers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Thursday? Dive into the list of today's session's top gainers and losers for a comprehensive overview.

headline: Iowa American Water Announces Over $55 Million Invested in 2025 Statewide Infrastructure Upgrades
summary: Iowa American Water announced today its 2025 summary of investments for system improvements, totaling more than $55 million in water and wastewater system upgrades throughout its service areas across Iowa.

raw.headline: Iowa American Water Announces Over $55 Million Invested in 2025 Statewide Infrastructure Upgrades

headline: American Water Unit Gets Rate Hike Nod, Supports Ongoing Investments
summary: AWK unit wins West Virginia rate hike approval and is set to add $20.5M in annual revenues as new water and wastewater rates take effect on March 1, 2026.

raw.headline: American Water Unit Gets Rate Hike Nod, Supports Ongoing Investments
raw.summary: AWK unit wins West Virginia rate hike approval and is set to add $20.5M in annual revenues as new water and wastewater rates take effect on March 1, 2026.

headline: Is  American Water Works Company, Inc. (AWK) Among the Best Water Management Stocks to Buy?
summary: Xylem Inc. (NYSE:XYL) is one of the 11 Best Water Management Stocks to Buy. On February 13, 2026, UBS analyst Joshua Spector reduced the price objective for Xylem Inc.
